description: Challenges for Infrared signal training with FLIRC USB receiver

challenges.name: Detect IR Signal
challenges.description: Receive any IR signal from a remote control or Flipper Zero
instructions: Navigate to Infrared > Universal Remote on your Flipper Zero
Or use any IR remote control
Point it at the FLIRC USB receiver
Press any button to send an IR signal
hints: Point the remote directly at the FLIRC receiver
Make sure there are no obstructions between remote and receiver
Try a TV or AC remote if Flipper Zero is not available

challenges.name: Capture & Replay
challenges.description: Record an IR signal and replay the exact same signal
instructions: Step 1: Send an IR signal (any button) to be recorded
Step 2: The system memorizes the signal
Step 3: Send the EXACT same signal again
The system verifies both signals match
challenges.failure_message: Signals do not match - try sending the same button
hints: Use the same remote and same button both times
On Flipper Zero: Infrared > Learn > save, then replay

challenges.name: Protocol Analysis
challenges.description: Send multiple IR signals and identify the protocols used
instructions: Send 3 different IR signals to the receiver
The system identifies the IR protocol for each
Common protocols: NEC, RC5, RC6, Sony SIRC, Samsung
Try using different remotes or Flipper Zero protocols
hints: Most TV remotes use NEC protocol
Try Flipper Zero's IR > Universal Remote for different protocols
